thorax and heart normal; no frank PI vegetation; spleen normal, aorta ok; er: increased consistency - no blood - no tenderness - IDx: prostatitis?", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "rocefin 2 g IV then batrim therapy at home", 0.0, 0.5)
